title: ixodia achilleoides subsp. arenicola
intro: Ixodia achilleoides subsp. arenicola, also known as the coastal yarrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to eastern Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of coastal yarrow include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Coastal yarrow can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
